title: Host AI native tool interaction hook tests

TestFirewallHook.covers: firewall.py PreToolUse Bash command gate — allows safe, blocks dangerous, ignores non-Bash, passes host-native tools

TestTodoStateTracker.covers: todo-state-tracker.py PostToolUse — feature flag gating, empty response handling

TestPreToolInject.covers: pre-tool-inject.py PreToolUse — plan injection, read-only tool filtering, host-native tool handling

TestPostToolOutput.covers: post-tool-output.py PostToolUse — language preservation observer, empty input, Korean detection

TestHostNativeToolLifecycle.covers: Cross-hook integration — TodoWrite/AskUserQuestion pass all PreToolUse hooks, no blocking of host-native tools

key_assertions: Host-native tools (TodoWrite, AskUserQuestion) never blocked by firewall
Todo tracker exits cleanly with feature flag off
Pre-tool inject exits cleanly without planning_enforcement
Post-tool output observer produces no stdout
